summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Rhino Drishti AI-powered intelligence aggregation platform. Backend APIs fully functional (100% success rate). Frontend UI loads properly with military theme and responsive design. Identified intermittent frontend-backend data integration issues affecting data display consistency.

integration_issues.issue: Dashboard shows 0 values intermittently despite backend returning correct data (32 total items, 4 critical)
Items display inconsistently - sometimes shows skeleton loaders, sometimes shows real data
Page title shows 'Intelligence Feed' instead of 'Cross-Border Developments'

passed_tests: All backend APIs (dashboard/stats, intelligence, alerts, daily-brief, weekly-trends, sources, fetch-news) - 43/43 tests passed
Frontend page navigation (Dashboard, Intelligence Feed, Cross-Border, Daily Brief, Weekly Trends, Alerts)
NER map rendering and state interactions
Search functionality in top bar and feed page
Filter system (state, threat type, severity filters)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix React state management issue causing intermittent data display problems. Backend APIs work perfectly but frontend sometimes fails to display the fetched data. The issue appears to be timing-related where components render before API responses complete or state updates fail to trigger re-renders. Consider adding loading states, error boundaries, and proper state management with useEffect dependency arrays.
